title: Generate Dockerfile from image or container
body:
Hi Everybody,

We are curious if this is a possibility? Can buildah generate Dockerfile from an image or container?
Just like commit but pipe into a Dockerfile.

Many thanks for your brilliant effort and support.

God blesses!!!

Best regards,
Sanyaade


`

comments.body:
A Containerfile/Dockerfile is a perscription of how to create an image. No tool can reverse engineer the Containerfile/Dockerfile from the image.  So no. 
Some people have talked about embedding Containerfiles into images, but often the context directory used to build an image is critical, and then the regististries and repos used to pull packages is necessary.

Bottom line what is your goal with this?

Okay! for teaching and research, not much, we are all hackers :) 

I have come across some utility on GitHub that honing this posibility 
I am closing the issue now.

God blesses!!!

Best regards,
Sanyaade
